usage: analyze_resistance [-help] [-cell <string>] [-die_mode {3dic}] [-domain <string>] [-domain_threshold <float>] [-exclude_list_file <string>] [-force_reextraction {true false}] [-instance_list {string1 string2 ...}] [-instance_list_file <string>] [-instance_pair_list {string1 string2 ...}] [-instance_pair_list_file <string>] [-net <string>] [-net_threshold {string1 string2 ...}] [-node_list {string1 string2 ...}] [-node_list_file <string>] [-node_pair_list {string1 string2 ...}] [-node_pair_list_file <string>] [-output <string>] [-output_dir <string>] [-print_cell_name] [-region <string>] [-report_limit <integer>] [-threshold <float>]

options.name: -cell
options.description: master cell name or name list

options.name: -instance_pair_list
options.description: {string1 string2 ...} instance pair list {{INST1 INST2 [PIN1 PIN2]}+}

options.name: -node_pair_list
options.description: node pair list {{x1 y1 layer1 x2 y2 layer2 [label]}+}

options.name: -print_cell_name
options.description: print cell names in the effective resistance report

options.name: -region
options.description: analysis region {x1 y1 x2 y2 layer [num_nodes] [region_name]}

options.name: -report_limit
options.description: limit number on how many effective resistance to report
